Home / Lore / Factions

Lore category

Factions

Source-linked factions records in the Raigulus Division Lore Archive.

8structured records

faction

Black Tusk

An advanced private military faction that sabotages the Division Network, invades Washington and pursues national control through high-end weapons and robotics.

not applicablesource reviewed

faction

Cleaners

A faction formed from sanitation workers and first responders who attempt to eradicate infection through fire.

not applicablesource reviewed

faction

Hyenas

A hostile Washington faction recognizable by gas masks and, in later seasonal material, an expanding Spice operation tied to the Dark Zones.

not applicablesource reviewed

faction

Last Man Battalion

A hostile Manhattan faction that cooperates with Aaron Keener and retains a command structure after the first game's events.

not applicablesource reviewed

faction

Outcasts

A hostile Division 2 faction whose continued activity and developing alliance with the True Sons and Hyenas are confirmed in official seasonal material.

not applicablesource reviewed

faction

Peacekeepers

A friendly Lower Manhattan survivor group formed by civilians and former Joint Task Force members.

not applicablesource reviewed

faction

Rikers

A faction originating with escaped Rikers Island prisoners and later recruits, reorganized into splinter groups after the first game.

not applicablesource reviewed

faction

True Sons

An organized paramilitary faction using former military and JTF expertise, heavy firepower and territorial control in Washington.

not applicablesource reviewed

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
